description: Host PTY runner for pibo debug pty, including process spawn, terminal sizing, raw output, scripted input, named keys, and timeout cleanup.

userStories.title: Implement host PTY process backend
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want pibo debug pty to start commands under a real host pseudo-terminal so that terminal UI behavior matches SSH/user execution.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement a host PTY runner behind the shared scenario execution interface
Start arbitrary commands under PTY with configured rows and cols
Capture raw output from the PTY without stripping ANSI sequences
Return exit status, timeout status, and termination diagnostics to the caller
Focused host PTY runner tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement scripted input steps
userStories.description: As a QA engineer, I want terminal-safe scripted input so that Ink commands can be typed reliably during PTY scenarios.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement typeText with per-character input and configurable inputDelayMs
Implement writeBytes for raw input
Implement press mappings for Enter, Escape, CtrlC, Up, and Down
Implement sleepMs without sending input
Tests cover per-character typing, Enter handling, raw bytes, and at least one navigation/control key
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement wait and timeout control
userStories.description: As an implementation agent, I want waits and timeouts so that stuck interactive processes do not block jobs indefinitely.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement waitFor against accumulated output using the scenario timeout for that step when present
Implement wall-clock timeout for the whole PTY run
Implement idle timeout based on absence of output
Timeouts terminate the child process and report whether termination was graceful or forced
Tests cover wait success, wait timeout, wall-clock timeout, and idle timeout
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add deterministic host PTY fixture tests
userStories.description: As a reviewer, I want deterministic PTY fixture coverage so that the runner is verified before it is used against pibo tui:sessions.
acceptanceCriteria: Add a deterministic local interactive fixture command or test helper
Test a complete scenario that waits for output, types text, presses Enter, observes echo/result, and exits
The test does not require real provider credentials or network access
Focused PTY integration tests pass
Typecheck passes
